overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny Los Santos urban environment, getting struck by a vehicle at an intersection, and continuing to explore the commercial street. The clip features palm-lined sidewalks, art deco architecture, and the distinctive Cockatoos nightclub building.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a beige office building with palm trees, approaching a park bench

notable_agents.action: woman in leopard print top sitting on park bench facing the street
man in gray jacket sitting on park bench looking at phone

entered.detail: Multi-story beige building with vertical windows and palm trees along the facade
Modern high-rise building with glass facade and balconies
Black metal park benches situated on grass verge
Tall palm trees lining the sidewalk between building and street
Metal public trash can on the grass verge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny city sidewalk next to a beige office building lined with palm trees. Two NPCs sit on park benches to the right - a woman facing the street and a man looking at his phone. In the distance, a tall glass apartment tower rises above the street.

events.description: exits sidewalk and steps onto the street intersection crosswalk
character is struck by a black convertible vehicle and knocked to the ground

agents.ego_description: stepping off the curb and attempting to cross the intersection before being hit

notable_agents.action: black convertible sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: Cream-colored art deco building with arched entrance and decorative tower
Arched pedestrian bridge connecting two buildings with crenellated roofline
Overhead traffic signal gantry spanning the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk of a busy intersection. An art deco building with an arched entrance becomes prominent on the left, while a black convertible drives through the intersection. At the end of the segment, the character is struck by a vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection pavement at ground level

events.description: camera tumbles and rolls on the asphalt after collision with vehicle
character recovers from the ground and stands back up

agents.ego_description: lying on the ground recovering from being hit, then getting back up

segments.scene_description: The camera violently tumbles and rolls on the asphalt surface of the intersection, showing disorienting views of the sky, road, and building tops. The character then recovers and stands back up, resuming an upright perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street sidewalk with commercial buildings and traffic

events.description: red sports car and black SUV drive past on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk observing passing traffic and approaching a street corner

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the street past the character
black SUV stopped at traffic light

entered.detail: Distinctive black building with large rooftop sign reading 'Cockatoos' and cactus plants in front
Large commercial billboard with advertisements visible above street level
Beige newspaper vending machine on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: After recovering from the collision, the character walks along the sidewalk past various vehicles including a red sports car and black SUV. The distinctive black Cockatoos nightclub building becomes visible in the distance, featuring a large rooftop sign and cactus plants along the facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with pedestrian crossing and waiting pedestrians

events.description: approaches street corner where three pedestrians are standing

agents.ego_description: walking up to the street corner and passing by three men standing at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: man in red patterned shirt and brown hat standing at corner
man in white t-shirt and green cap standing at corner

entered.detail: Metal pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing button

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a street corner where three men are standing near a crosswalk. The Cockatoos nightclub is now clearly visible to the left. The character passes the pedestrians - including a man in a red shirt and another in a white shirt with a green cap - and continues toward the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with nightclub entrance and cactus landscaping

events.description: crosses the street toward the black nightclub building facade

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the front of the Cockatoos nightclub

entered.detail: Large rooftop sign with stylized 'Cockatoos' lettering
Row of tall saguaro cactus plants in front of the nightclub entrance
Tall building with purple and blue colored facade

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street and approaches the front of the Cockatoos nightclub. The distinctive black building facade features tall cactus plants and a large rooftop sign. The camera moves along the front of the building, showing its unique architecture and the surrounding commercial street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunny urban district that begins with a peaceful stroll and culminates in the approach to a distinctive nightclub. It begins on a palm-lined sidewalk beside a beige office building and park benches, moving toward a busy intersection where an art deco building stands prominently. As the character enters the crosswalk, the perspective violently tumbles and rolls across the asphalt following a collision with a vehicle before recovering to an upright position. The scene then shifts back to the sidewalk, passing parked sports cars and SUVs as the black facade of the Cockatoos nightclub and its rooftop sign emerge in the distance. Finally, the camera moves past a group of pedestrians at a street corner and crosses the road to glide along the front of the nightclub, highlighting its unique architecture and cactus-lined exterior.
